text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I can run anywhere... Anywhere at all...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing beneath my feet... No ground,
nothing... I'm simply sliding... over the cogs...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Oh? You find the fact that I don't get
exhausted during races... strange?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, I do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Over in one of the classrooms, Eishin Flash has
confronted Manhattan Cafe with an abrupt
assertion.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've counted your wins, Cafe. You tend to
compete in long-distance races, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Normally, the rate at which racers fall behind is
perfectly proportional to how much energy they
have left...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But in your case, Cafe, that doesn't seem to
happen.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You never stop. You never slow down. It's as if
you are unfettered by rules or restrictions...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You are akin to... the Gespenst... A being of the
void, that wanders endlessly...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I do not wish for my plans to go awry. Please
perform in line with your potential.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm not sure... whether I can do that...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Um... If you'd like to know how I've gotten this far
with long-distance races...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I think it has to do with my nails...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Long-distance races aren't as demanding on
my nails as short-distance ones, which require
quick bursts of energy.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I've also made an effort to run without putting my
nails at risk, just like my trainer told me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I think these factors have helped me cut down on
a lot of wear and tear...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
In trying to escape an inescapable restraint, I
found myself heading in a better direction...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a flaw she's had since birth. And perhaps she's
found a way to use that flaw to her advantage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But if I were to really use my imagination...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe Manhattan Cafe's very existence is so
faint that it's escaped the laws of gravity. ...It's
like she's a spirit.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Magnificent work, Manhattan Cafe! You have
conquered more than two long-distance races!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: And for that, I present to you this award! Bravo!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... very much. I'll do my very best to
accomplish more...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like, to Manhattan Cafe, distance is
nothing to be feared.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Magnificent work, Manhattan Cafe! You have
conquered more than four long-distance races!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And for that, I present to you this award! I
applaud your fervent efforts! I wish you only the
best!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you... very much.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I do find it strange sometimes... that the other
runners around me fall back and disappear from
sight...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe has become a contender to be
taken seriously. No longer is she "the girl always
standing in last."

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Magnificent work, Manhattan Cafe! You have
conquered more than six long-distance races!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And for that, I present to you this award! You
have become a legend! You are unbeatable!
Stupendous!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you... very much.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I'm not me anymore. Sometimes, I feel as
if it's my soul that's doing all the running...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe is already on her way to
liberation from whatever was holding her back...
and now she stands at a landmark achievement.
